testcase.name: fullBattleRoundFlowTest
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/home/codespace/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.5/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.5.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "Object.toString()" because the return value of "java.util.Map.get(Object)" is null at
